Medium tone (Medium Beige): the universal shade in the line, suitable for medium skin tone, fair skin with pigmentation. It has a neutral, slightly bronzed undertone.

warnings_en:
Keep out of reach of children. 
Do not swallow. 
Avoid direct contact with eyes. 
Take the Sun with responsibility.

description_en: A multifunctional, maximum SPF50+ sunscreen that simultaneously protects your skin from harmful UV rays, prevents dehydration and helps your skin maintain a healthy level of elasticity. The cream creates a thin, moisture-resistant protective film, strengthening the skin's protective barrier. It not only protects against harmful radiation, but also has hygroscopic properties, keeping the skin optimally moisturised without clogging pores or leaving a sticky feeling. Safe chemical filter allows to provide reliable SPF50+ PA++++ protection against 98% of UVA and UVB rays. Prevents excessive melanin production, reducing the risk of age spots.
how_to_use_en: After skin care, apply evenly to the skin that is prone to exposure to UV rays.
warnings_en:
Keep out of reach of children. 
Do not swallow. 
Avoid direct contact with eyes. 
Take the Sun with responsibility.

short_description_en: Gentle transforming cleanser melts away makeup, dirt, and sebum without drying the skin. Easily rinses off, leaving skin clean and comfortable.
description_en: It is a delicate transformer cleanser that dissolves all types of dirt, makeup and sebum, providing thorough cleansing without drying out the skin. It contains a special emulsifier that helps to bind water and oil molecules in one formula, so that cosmetics and sebum melt on the skin and are easily removed without residue when water is added.

Keep out of reach of children. 
Do not swallow. 
Avoid direct contact with eyes.

short_description_en: Renewing serum with 24K gold boosts skin regeneration, deeply hydrates, and enhances radiance. Leaves skin smoother, firmer, and visibly refreshed with a glowing effect.
description_en: Yu.R Skin Solution Renewing Serum with 24K Premium Gold Ampoule is used for cell renewal and triggering cellular respiration and regeneration processes. 24K colloidal gold hydrolysate provides improved penetration of nutrients, accelerates blood and lymph circulation, and 24 plant extracts with a prolonged effect actively moisturize, with a mild lipolytic effect. The skin looks fresh, bright, healthy and visibly tighter. The serum has a watery, slightly viscous texture and does not require subsequent covering of the skin with cream. The colloidal gold plates dissolve easily when the product is applied, creating an optical effect of illuminated and radiant skin. Use the serum in the evening for deep overnight recovery and in the morning to maintain skin hydration and primer the skin before the toning stage.

warnings_en:
Keep out of reach of children.

Avoid direct contact with eyes.

short_description_en: SPF50+ cushion foundation with medium coverage evens skin tone, hydrates, and gives a natural long-lasting radiant finish.
description_en:
Compact and convenient powder foundation in a powder bottle format. The weightless, creamy foundation blends easily with the sponge pad and retouches the skin without emphasising roughness, pores and wrinkles. The product gives a semi-matte finish to illuminated skin. Medium coverage. Ideal for those who want a "make-up without make-up" effect. The foundation protects against UF radiation (50 SPF+), keeps the skin moisturised and does not bleed under any circumstances. The cushion has a water-resistant effect - it does not melt or fade during the day, regardless of the ambient temperature, maintaining coverage even when swimming in the sea and pool. The tonal couch is available in BIG SIZE format - 25 grams, instead of the standard 15-gram variants of couchons on the market. The coveted trio of multidirectional essences in the Yu.R Skin Solution Moist Layer Cushion will enhance the beauty of the skin while delicately concealing imperfections: the pink essence actively moisturises and cares for the skin, the white essence gives radiance and protects against UVA and UVB rays (SPF 50+), the beige essence gives the perfect tone, blending with the skin and creating a soft satin finish.

Tone 21: recommended for porcelain-toned, olive-toned or ivory skin.
how_to_use_en: Take an appropriate amount on a puff and lightly pat and spread on your skin.
warnings_en:
